spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use generous padding. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
spacing_and_layout.grid: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for dashboards. Bento grid for marketing pages with gap-8 to gap-12.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-First. Left-align text for better readability on dense content.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary: Bege bg (#E0DCD1), Preto text (#191919). Secondary: Transparent bg, Verde border (#465242), Bege text. Include data-testid.
components.cards: Subtle borders with Verde (#465242), flat background (Preto #191919 or #242424), no heavy shadows. Sharp edges or max 8px border-radius.
components.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism (bg-[#191919]/80 backdrop-blur-md) and Verde bottom border. Visible navigation links on desktop.
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized. Bege text, Verde focus rings, Preto background for inputs.

animations.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Hover background/border colors should be a lighter hue. Focus states for accessibility.
animations.page_load: Fade in, translate Y for smooth scroll reveal. Staggered list animations.

hero_image.description: Dark aesthetic laptop desk setup for hero section overlay

service_craftsman.description: Craftsman working on wood, representing manual labor services

service_laptop.description: Freelancer working on laptop, representing digital services

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has dark gradients. Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Use text shadow if needed.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing page layout structure. Use raw divs/sections for overlapping and asymmetry.
Use Shadcn components for interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Inputs) but customize classes to match the brand colors (Preto, Bege, Verde).
Clients (Contratantes) do NOT login. Build a simple service request form for them.
Build a Dashboard for the Freelancer to manage profile, portfolio, and view client demands (vagas).
Ensure all buttons and links have hover states and data-testid attributes.
Update tailwind.config.js and index.css to map the brand colors correctly (Preto: #191919, Bege: #E0DCD1, Verde: #465242).
